calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-01-2022 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Prove-Up Hearing And Default Court Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-07-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendants Looly's PBC, dba WeTheTrillions, fdba Le Cupboard, and WeTheTrillions Health PBC, dba WeTheTrillions.
Dept. 514. Judge: Michelle Tong. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:15 a.m.

Kaipo K.B. Young, Esq. appeared for Oakville Produce Partners, LLC.
Huy Tran, Credit Manager and Custodian of Records for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Messrs. Young and Tran appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendants Looly's PBC, dba WeTheTrillions, fdba Le Cupboard, and WeTheTrillions Health PBC, dba WeTheTrillions.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract and Common Counts was filed on March 22, 2021.
Plaintiff's First Amended Complaint for Breach and Common Counts was filed on July 19, 2021, and personally served on defendants Looly's PBC, dba WeTheTrillions, fdba Le Cupboard, and WeTheTrillions Health PBC, dba WeTheTrillions, authorized Agent of Process on July 26, 2021.
DOE defendants were dismissed on November 29, 2021.
Default as to both defendants was entered on December 1, 2021.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Oakville Produce Partners, LLC, and against the defaulted defendants Looly's PBC, dba WeTheTrillions, fdba Le Cupboard, and WeTheTrillions Health PBC, dba WeTheTrillions, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $41,207.50.
Prejudgment Interest - $6096.00.
Attorney Fees - $2,625.00.
Costs - $630.00.

Total - $50,558.50.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Proceedings concluded at 10:37 a.m.
